ocr_findings.description: The 3-row table (テキストマイニング / データサイエンス / ゲーミフィケーション) is rendered as a markdown table in OCR with correct headers and cell content. Table structure preserved adequately.
Digital divide illustration image at bottom replaced by img-0.jpeg placeholder; no text content lost.

reviewer_notes: Page covers data mining definition, related-terms table, information literacy, and digital divide sections. All prose and table cell content faithfully reproduced. The illustrative image at bottom is a placeholder only and carries no text content.
